boxes.text:
1: Require: unannotated data pool U, target LM model
query strategy S, annotation budget B
2: Initialization: A = , θ = θ(0)on A
2: for rounds r = 1, ..., R do
.
Ut ← Extract from U by random sub-sampling
[QH , QG] ← Acquire [BH, BG] samples by quer
.
function S on model f , data Ur
AH ← Annotate acquired samples QH by human
AH = AH U AH
Execute prompt retrieval from AH
AG ← Annotate acquired samples QG by LLMs
Ar = AH U AG
U=U\Ar
f(xi; θ(r)) ← Fine-tune f (xi; θ(r)) on Ar
turn f (x: θ(r)) 4
